name: Aircall
notes: Customers self-mint api_id/api_token (Basic Auth) in company settings; OAuth2 is for marketplace apps. Requires a paid Aircall account, so moderate.

name: SendGrid
notes: Free self-serve signup lets you create a scoped API key sent as Bearer token; straightforward REST v3 API, so easy.

name: Meta Ads
notes: Signup is free and Standard access hits own ad accounts, but production/third-party use needs Advanced Access via App Review (gated-approval).

name: Shopify
notes: Free dev store + custom app in admin self-generates an X-Shopify-Access-Token; public apps use OAuth. GraphQL is primary (REST legacy). Shopify ships official Dev/Storefront MCP servers.

name: Amazon Selling Partner
notes: Must register as an SP-API developer (KYC) and register an app before LWA/OAuth2 auth; public apps require review, so gated-approval and moderate.
